name: HRT_BOOKMARKS_VL
query: SELECT BM.BOOKMARK_ID, BM.ENTERPRISE_ID, BM.PROFILE_ID, BM.URL, BMT.DESCRIPTION, BM.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, BM.CREATED_BY, BM.CREATION_DATE, BM.LAST_UPDATED_BY, BM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, BM.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_BOOKMARKS_B BM, HRT_BOOKMARKS_TL BMT WHERE BM.BOOKMARK_ID = BMT.BOOKMARK_ID AND BMT.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
